title: Investigate and fix block position off-by-one in gather-dirt
description:
## Problem
The bot is digging at Y=62-63 instead of Y=64 (surface at Y=65 feet level). This causes the bot to mine incorrect blocks and fail to gather the intended resource. The root cause is unknown.

## Source
Handoff Sprint 40 P0 Fixes — Issue C: "Block Position Confusion (Off-By-One?)"

## Possible Causes (from handoff)
1. `bot.findBlock()` returns the nearest block by Euclidean distance, not by reachability path. If blocks at Y=64 are already mined, the nearest remaining dirt might be at Y=63.
2. The bot might be falling through mined blocks and `botPos()` reflects the lower Y.
3. The `GoalNear` tolerance (2 blocks) might be too large, causing the bot to target blocks below feet level.
4. Block selection logic in the adapter's mine handler may be off by one in Y-level calculation.

## Requirements
1. PR #2 coordinate logging must be completed first (adds `block=(bx,by,bz)` to `BlockMinedEvent` and `pos=(x,y,z)` to all goal/action logs)
2. Deploy coordinate logging to a test server and gather dirt — examine logs to determine actual target vs mined Y-levels
3. Based on log evidence, implement the specific fix:
   - If Euclidean distance: add Y-level priority to `findBlock` query
   - If falling through: add ground-check before dig or reduce `GoalNear` tolerance
   - If `GoalNear` tolerance: reduce from 2 to 1 or use `bot.entity.position` offset
   - If block selection logic: fix Y calculation in mine handler
4. Verify fix by running same test and confirming `block=(x,64,z)` in logs

## References
- `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` — mine handler, `findBlock` calls, `GoalNear` configuration
- `Agent.Core/Events/WorldEvents.cs` — `BlockMinedEvent.BlockPosition` (PR #2)
- Handoff document: Issue C
- Council review: related to DEF-PAPER-3 (pathfinding quality)

comments.author: Agent
comments.text: Completed Sprint 40 P0. Root cause confirmed: bot.findBlock() uses Euclidean distance. When surface grass at Y=64 isn't dirt, nearest dirt at Y=63 gets selected. Fix: findBestBlock() three-pass scorer — (1) same Y-level, (2) nearby Y with MINE_Y_PENALTY_WEIGHT=5 per level offset, (3) fallback. Also added BLOCK_MINING_ALIASES so mining 'dirt' also accepts 'grass_block' (grass drops dirt). All scoring constants extracted to named constants at top of index.js.
